# Instructra

Instructra is a UK-based platform for booking and managing driving lessons.
It consists of two mobile apps:
- Instructra (learner app): find instructors, book lessons, message, track progress
- Instructra Business (instructor app): manage bookings, availability, and grow your diary

This is the marketing website built with React (Vite + Tailwind CSS).

## Key routes
- / — Homepage (dual-mode: learner / instructor)
- /learners — Learner features and download
- /instructors — Instructor features and download
- /pricing — Business app pricing plans
- /how-it-works — Step-by-step guide
- /book-a-demo — Demo request form
- /about — About the company
- /contact — Contact form
- /driving-schools — Coming soon page
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service

## Contact
info@instructra.com
